text: Natural language processing, or NLP, is a branch of artificial intelligence that helps computers understand and work with human language. Instead of just reading words, NLP enables machines to grasp meaning, context, and even emotions in text. This technology powers many everyday tools. For example, translation apps use NLP to convert text between languages while keeping the original meaning. Sentiment analysis is another useful application, where computers can detect whether a review or comment is positive, negative, or neutral. Finally, chatbots rely on NLP to understand your questions and provide helpful responses, making customer service faster and more efficient.
